## Summary

- what changed?
- why now?

## Validation

- [ ] `./.venv/bin/python -m pytest`
- [ ] `python3 scripts/build_release.py` (if packaging or release behavior changed)
- [ ] docs updated where needed

## Safety and behavior notes

- does this change affect backup, diff, logging, or rollback behavior?
- are there any risky edge cases reviewers should focus on?

## Follow-up

- anything intentionally deferred?
